TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tjukuvulj, title = Tjukuvulj, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjukuvulj} }

S.FORM: Tjukuvulj Itiniay i Dawu Cen no Taitung ko Tjukuvulj a niyaro', 71 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 170 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 160 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 10 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan91%, Amis1%, Tayal1%, Puyuma1%. Tjukuvulj Itiniay i Jinfeng Cen no Taitung ko Tjukuvulj a niyaro', 34 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 116 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 98% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 114 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 2% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 2 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko . Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Tjukuvulj Itiniay i Sandimen Cen no Pingtung ko Tjukuvulj a niyaro', 40 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 115 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 98% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 113 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 2% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 2 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan76%, Rukai12%, Amis2%, roma9%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tjo~u~uko~u~ub~vo~u~uɾj itiniaj i ɬ~ɮawo~u~u ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u tjo~u~uko~u~ub~vo~u~uɾj a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, amis*%, tajaɾ*%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%. tjo~u~uko~u~ub~vo~u~uɾj itiniaj i *infəŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u tjo~u~uko~u~ub~vo~u~uɾj a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u . ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. tjo~u~uko~u~ub~vo~u~uɾj itiniaj i sanɬ~ɮimən ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u tjo~u~uko~u~ub~vo~u~uɾj a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, ro~u~ukai**%, amis*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Tjukuvulj Itiniay i Dawu Cen no Taitung ko Tjukuvulj a niyaro', 71 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 170 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 160 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 10 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan91%, Amis1%, Tayal1%, Puyuma1%. Tjukuvulj Itiniay i Jinfeng Cen no Taitung ko Tjukuvulj a niyaro', 34 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 116 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 98% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 114 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 2% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 2 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko . Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Tjukuvulj Itiniay i Sandimen Cen no Pingtung ko Tjukuvulj a niyaro', 40 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 115 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 98% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 113 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 2% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 2 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan76%, Rukai12%, Amis2%, roma9%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
